response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 20 years of experience and current staff-level AI-agent infrastructure work at Google demonstrates emerging AI expertise. However, lacks the demonstrated strategic AI/ML product-building depth, advanced AI degree, and customer advisory track record that the principal-level strategy role requires. Recent pivot into AI (April 2025) is promising but unproven at the scale needed for this position.
strengths: Currently at Google working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, directly relevant to AI strategy mission
20 years of breadth across software, infrastructure, and platforms with proven staff-level technical leadership
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, design patterns) that support building scalable AI systems
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI-related field; limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise before April 2025
No evidence of building products or platforms that leverage AI as a core differentiator
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners on adopting cutting-edge AI technologies

key_factors.factor: Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at Google
Limited AI/ML expertise and no advanced AI degree
20-year technical seniority with broad platform experience
